nodes.name: Weekly Monday 8AM EST
nodes.notes: Weekly internal data analysis for content ideas

nodes.name: Fetch App Analytics
nodes.notes: Gets weekly stats: total grades, avg scores, popular job roles, top scoring prompts

nodes.name: Fetch Leaderboard
nodes.notes: Gets current leaderboard for 'Top Prompters' content

messages.content: You are a content strategist for ScoreMyPrompt. Generate content ideas from internal app data. Focus on: interesting trends, surprising stats, educational angles, and engagement hooks.

Generate 5 content ideas from this week's ScoreMyPrompt data:

Weekly Stats:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.analytics) }}

Leaderboard:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.leaderboard) }}

For each idea, provide:
1. Title/Hook
2. Best platform (X, LinkedIn, Blog, YouTube, TikTok)
3. Content angle
4. Draft outline (3-4 bullet points)

Output as JSON array of ideas.

nodes.name: Groq: Generate Content Ideas
nodes.notes: Tier 1: Groq 70B analyzes app data → generates 5 content ideas

nodes.name: Add to Content Calendar
nodes.notes: Adds content ideas to Content Calendar as 'idea' status for review

parameters.subject: 💡 Weekly Content Ideas — {{ $json.ideas_count }} new from app data

meta.description: WF-6: Internal Data → Content Ideas. Fetches app analytics + leaderboard weekly → Groq generates 5 data-driven content ideas → adds to Content Calendar. Turns product data into marketing content.
